name: parking_selenium_test_generation_config
purpose: Configuration file for Copilot/Codex to set up Selenium automation testing from existing system/tool test cases.
source: Pasted text test case table converted to JSON
rules: Do not modify application source code.
Only create or modify files inside selenium-tests/.
Generate scripts only for browser-testable functional cases.
Do not generate tests for UI-only visual checks, manual-only checks, API-only Postman cases, or N/A cases.
Do not write actual results/status into the Excel file yet.
Prefer locators in this order: id, name, data-testid, stable CSS selector, XPath only if necessary.
If a locator cannot be confirmed from source code, add a TODO comment instead of guessing.
Each test function must include the original TC_ID in the function name or docstring.
For camera/OCR cases, inspect whether mock camera/image upload/test mode exists. If not, skip with clear pytest.mark.skip reason.

test_cases.automation_reason: Camera/OCR - requires camera stream with visible license plate. Cannot be reliably automated via Selenium without mock/test mode.
Camera/OCR - requires camera stream + pre-existing parking session. Difficult to automate simultaneous conditions.
Camera/OCR - requires partial plate visibility. Difficult to simulate via Selenium.
Camera/OCR - requires empty camera frame. Cannot control camera input.
Camera/OCR - requires specific vehicle (car) in camera frame.
Camera/OCR - requires government vehicle with blue plate.
Camera/OCR - requires vehicle with red license plate.
Camera/OCR + state - requires full lot + camera. Complex pre-condition setup needed.
Camera/OCR - requires 3 different vehicles sequentially. Difficult to automate camera input.
Camera/OCR + state - requires camera stream + existing parking session.
Camera/OCR + state - requires camera + verification of no session.
Camera/OCR + state - requires car in camera + existing session.
Camera/OCR + state - requires blue plate government vehicle + session.
Camera/OCR + state - requires red plate + session.
Camera/OCR + state - requires preventing duplicate checkout with camera.
Camera/OCR + state - requires 3 vehicles checkout sequentially with sessions.
